response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r2c1 is 0.10 below threshold (0.15 SoC) while our share minimum is 0.25; urgent request during scarcity cascade justifies conservative policy override to maintain cluster cohesion and reciprocal trust for our own r4c0 unlock attempt.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=['r3c0'].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide scarcity cascade unbroken. r4c0 reciprocal unlock attempt ongoing. No inbound aid received. Autonomy ~8h. Final micro-share window before critical depletion. Self-preservation mode active..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
